questions.question: What is the primary function of a router in a computer network?
options: A) To connect devices to the internet
B) To forward data between networks
C) To manage network traffic
D) To provide network security
questions.explanation: A router is a device that connects multiple networks together and routes data between them.

questions.question: Which type of network is characterized by a centralized device that manages all data communication?
options: A) Decentralized network
B) Client-server network
C) Peer-to-peer network
D) Hybrid network
questions.explanation: A client-server network is a type of network where a centralized server manages all data communication.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a subnet mask in IP addressing?
options: A) To identify the network ID and host ID
B) To determine the IP address of a device
C) To divide a network into smaller sub-networks
D) To secure network access
questions.explanation: A subnet mask is used to divide a network into smaller sub-networks and determine the network ID and host ID.

questions.question: Which of the following is a characteristic of a star network topology?
options: A) Nodes can send messages to any other node
B) Nodes are connected to a central hub
C) Nodes are connected to each other directly
D) Nodes are spread out across a large area
questions.explanation: A star network topology is characterized by nodes connected to a central hub, with all other nodes connected to the hub.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a repeater in a network?
options: A) To repeat back the original signal
B) To amplify the signal to extend its range
C) To convert signal frequencies
D) To filter out noise
questions.explanation: A repeater is used to amplify the signal to extend its range in a network and prevent signal degradation.
